hero.title: Where Every Child Discovers the Joy of Learning
hero.subtitle: Nurturing young minds through creativity, confidence, and the wonder of technology.
hero.intro: StemTechLab is a warm, bilingual learning home for children ages 6–18 across Saudi Arabia, UAE, and around the world. Our caring, certified teachers guide your child through hands-on adventures in coding, robotics, algorithms, and Arabic — in small, live classes where every child is seen, heard, and celebrated.
hero.trustBadges: Loved by 500+ families across the GCC

learnWithFun.title: Learning That Feels Like Play
learnWithFun.subtitle: Every lesson is a new adventure — where giggles, curiosity, and real skills grow together
learnWithFun.card1Desc: Your child builds real games, apps, and robots — learning by creating, not just watching
learnWithFun.card2Desc: Earn badges, reach new milestones, and feel proud of every achievement — big or small
learnWithFun.card3Desc: A gentle, kid-friendly world with trusted teachers — so parents feel at ease and children feel at home

whyProgramming.title: Why Coding Is a Beautiful Gift for Your Child
whyProgramming.subtitle: It's not just about computers — it's about helping your child believe in themselves
whyProgramming.intro: No matter what your child dreams of becoming — an artist, a doctor, an engineer, or a storyteller — learning to code teaches them how to think, how to try, and how to believe they can figure things out. It builds quiet confidence, sparks imagination, and shows them that their ideas matter.
whyProgramming.point1Desc: Coding gently teaches children to break big challenges into small, friendly steps — a skill that helps them in school, at home, and in every part of life.
whyProgramming.point2Desc: When children code, they become creators — making games, stories, apps, and robots. Screen time becomes something magical: a canvas for their imagination.
whyProgramming.point3Desc: Through puzzles and code, children build stronger thinking skills, better reasoning, and a love for discovering how things work.
whyProgramming.point4Desc: Technology touches every dream. Whether your child loves art, nature, sports, or science — these skills will walk beside them into whatever future they choose.

testimonials.title: Stories from Our StemTechLab Family
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from the parents and children whose lives have been touched
testimonials.t1Text: My daughter's eyes light up every time she opens StemTechLab. She built her first game in two weeks and told me, 'Mama, I made this!' — that moment meant everything.
testimonials.t2Text: The Arabic classes have been a blessing for our family. My son now recites with such beauty and confidence — his teacher truly cares about him.
testimonials.t3Text: I used to think coding was only for grown-ups. Now I've built my own robot and I dream of creating things that help people!

courses.title: Our Learning Adventures
courses.subtitle: Discover the perfect journey for your child's heart and mind
courses.noCourses: We couldn't find a match right now — try adjusting your filters and we'll help you find the right fit!

faq.a: All sessions are live, online, and interactive — your child joins via Zoom with a small group or 1-on-1 with a coach. No recordings replace live classes; every session is real-time.

faq.q: What if my child misses a session?
faq.a: Life happens! Missed sessions can be rescheduled at no extra cost. Just let us know 24 hours in advance and we'll find the next available slot.
Just a computer or laptop with a stable internet connection. No special software purchases required — everything your child needs will be set up before the first class.

faq.q: How many students are in each class?
faq.a: We keep groups small — typically 3 to 5 students — so every child gets personal attention and can ask questions freely.
We offer a full refund if you cancel before the second session. After that, we'll work with you on a pro-rated credit toward another course.

challenge.badge: Free fun activity · No account needed
challenge.title: Paper Pixel Letter
challenge.subtitle: A fun 10-minute activity you can do with paper and pencil! Discover how computers see pictures — perfect to try before your very first coding class.
challenge.step1Body: Grab a blank sheet and draw a 5×5 grid (five rows and five columns). A ruler helps, but wobbly squares work too — this is about having fun!
challenge.step2Body: Color in some squares so they form the first letter of your name, nice and blocky. Stay inside the grid — no curves, just cool square shapes!
challenge.step3Body: For each row, count how many squares you colored (0 to 5). Write those numbers down — you've just written a tiny 'program' that describes your letter!
challenge.step4Body: Show someone only your five numbers. Can they guess your letter? That's actually how computers share pictures — with clever little descriptions instead of big images!
challenge.hintBody: Think of those old video games with tiny blocky letters — they were made of little squares too! Your grid is like a handmade picture, just like the ones inside every computer font.
challenge.formTitle: Want next month's fun activity in your inbox?
challenge.formSubtitle: We'll only send fun creative projects and gentle tips — nothing else. You can unsubscribe anytime.
challenge.childPlaceholder: So we can personalize future emails
challenge.optInLabel: Yes — email me the next monthly challenge and kid-friendly STEM ideas.
challenge.successBody: A little surprise will land in your inbox soon. While you wait, feel free to explore our courses or find the perfect class for your child.
challenge.errorGeneric: Oops — something didn't work quite right. Please try again, or reach out to us on our contact page.

about.title: Built with Love, for Every Child
about.subtitle: A team of teachers, parents, and dreamers creating a place where every child feels they belong.
about.visionDesc: A world where every child — wherever they live — can discover the joy of learning, grow in faith, and find their voice through knowledge.
about.missionDesc: To give children ages 6–18 a warm, live learning experience in coding, robotics, and Arabic — where they're encouraged, celebrated, and never left behind.
about.aiTechBody: Our Course finder uses server-side connections to the OpenAI API and the DeepSeek API. Parents and guardians can describe their child in their own words or use a short form; we turn that into suggested live courses. Suggestions are advisory—you always choose what’s right for your family. We are not sponsored by OpenAI or DeepSeek; we use their technology as independent tools under our privacy policy.
about.value1Desc: Every decision we make starts with one question: is this good for the child?
about.value2Desc: A gentle, caring space where parents feel at ease and children feel protected.
about.value3Desc: We believe learning should feel exciting, not exhausting — smiles are part of the lesson.
about.value4Desc: Whether you're in Dubai or London, in English or Arabic — every family is welcome here.
about.storyP1: We started StemTechLab because we believe every child deserves a teacher who sees them, a classroom where they feel safe, and lessons that make their hearts sing.
about.storyP2: Today, we teach coding, robotics, and Arabic to families around the world — always in small, live classes where every child's name is known and every question is welcomed.
about.teamSubtitle: Teachers, builders, and dreamers — all here for your child
about.starsSubtitle: Warm, dedicated educators who make every child feel special
about.starsComingSoon: Our stars will show up soon — stay tuned!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your family's safety and privacy are at the heart of everything we do. Because we serve children, we hold ourselves to the highest standards of care. Here's how we protect your information.
privacy.s1Content: We collect information you provide when creating an account, such as your name, email address, and your child's age and interests. We also collect usage data such as course progress and platform interactions to improve our services.
privacy.s2Content:
We use your information to:
• Provide and personalize our educational services
• Track learning progress and recommend courses
• Communicate important updates about your account
• Improve our platform and develop new features
privacy.s2aContent: When you use our Course finder (chat and/or form), we send the inputs you provide to OpenAI and DeepSeek through their official APIs so we can return suggested courses. We do not sell your data to them; their processing is governed by their policies and our agreements. You can avoid this flow by browsing the catalog without using the Course finder. Human instructors—not AI—teach all live classes.
privacy.s3Content: Protecting children is our highest priority. We never collect personal information from children under 13 without a parent's clear permission. Parents can review, change, or remove their child's information at any time — you are always in control.
privacy.s4Content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits. We never sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s5Content: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences (like language and theme). We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes on our platform.
privacy.s6Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us at privacy@stemtechlab.com.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to the StemTechLab family! By using our platform, you agree to these terms. We've kept them clear and simple — please take a moment to read them.
terms.s1Content: By accessing or using StemTechLab, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you are a parent or guardian registering on behalf of a child, you accept these terms on their behalf.
terms.s2Content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. Parents or guardians must create and manage accounts for children under 18. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
terms.s3Content:
You agree to use StemTechLab only for lawful educational purposes. You must not:
• Share inappropriate content
• Attempt to access other users' accounts
• Use the platform to harm or bully others
• Reverse-engineer or copy our content
terms.s4Content: All course content, designs, and materials on StemTechLab are protected by copyright. You may access them for personal educational use only. Redistribution, copying, or commercial use is strictly prohibited.
terms.s5Content: StemTechLab provides educational content as-is. While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee specific learning outcomes. We are not liable for any indirect damages arising from use of our platform.
terms.s6Content: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

faq.title: Questions from
faq.subtitle: Answers to the things parents ask us most
faq.ce1_q: What ages are StemTechLab courses designed for?
faq.ce1_a: Our courses are lovingly designed for children ages 6–18. Each learning path is tailored to your child's age and level, so they always feel comfortable and challenged in just the right way. We recommend two sessions a week (one hour each) for the best growth.
faq.ce2_q: How do you keep my child's information safe?
faq.ce2_a: Your child's safety is our top priority — both online and offline. All data is encrypted, we follow COPPA guidelines for children's privacy, and we never share personal information with anyone. You have full control over your child's account at all times.
faq.ce3_q: Can my child re-watch their classes?
faq.ce3_a: Of course! Every live session is recorded and available in your dashboard within 24 hours. Your child can revisit lessons anytime — to review a tricky concept or catch up on a class they missed.
faq.ce4_a: We offer fun, optional practice activities and mini-projects after each class to help ideas stick. They take about 15–30 minutes and are designed to feel like play, not pressure. They're encouraged but never required.
faq.ce5_q: What do the classes look like?
faq.ce5_a: Classes are live, online, and full of warmth! Your child joins a small group (4–8 friends) or a private 1-on-1 session with a caring teacher. We use interactive tools, shared screens, and hands-on activities to make every minute joyful and engaging.
faq.ce6_q: What does my child need to get started?
faq.ce6_a: Just a laptop or desktop computer and a good internet connection — that's it! Our coding tools run right in the browser, so there's nothing to install. For robotics classes, we'll send the kit straight to your door.
faq.ce7_q: Does my child need any experience?
faq.ce7_a: Not at all! Every expert was once a beginner. Our courses welcome children of all levels — from their very first line of code to advanced projects. We'll help you find the perfect starting point for your child.
faq.ce8_q: What if we need to reschedule?
faq.ce8_a: Life happens, and we completely understand! You can reschedule a class up to 4 hours before it starts at no extra cost. You can also pause your plan anytime — your family's schedule always comes first.
faq.cs1_a: We're always happy to hear from you! You can write to us through our Contact page, email contact@stemtechlab.com, or use the live chat on our website. Our friendly team responds within 2–4 hours on business days.
faq.cs2_q: What if we're not happy with the course?
faq.cs2_a: Your family's happiness means everything to us. We offer a full refund within 7 days of enrollment, no questions asked. After the first week, we provide fair, prorated refunds based on unused sessions.
faq.cs3_q: Can we try a class before enrolling?
faq.cs3_a: Absolutely! We'd love for your child to experience a full class with one of our teachers — completely free, with no obligation. It's the best way to see if StemTechLab feels like the right home for your child.
faq.cs4_q: Do you have discounts for siblings or longer plans?
faq.cs4_a: Yes! Siblings get 15% off, and our quarterly and annual plans come with lovely savings. Reach out to our team and we'll find the best option for your family.
faq.cs5_q: How can I see how my child is doing?
faq.cs5_a: Your parent dashboard shows you everything — completed lessons, projects your child has built, teacher feedback, and more. You'll also receive a warm weekly summary by email so you never miss a milestone.
faq.tq1_q: Who are the teachers at StemTechLab?
faq.tq1_a: Our teachers are certified educators and experienced professionals who genuinely love working with children. Every teacher goes through careful selection, background checks, and ongoing training — because your child deserves someone truly special.
faq.tq2_q: How many children are in each class?
faq.tq2_a: We keep our groups small — no more than 8 children per teacher — so every child gets the attention they deserve. We also offer private 1-on-1 sessions for children who thrive with individual support.
faq.tq3_q: Can my child stay with a teacher they love?
faq.tq3_a: Of course! When a child bonds with a teacher, that connection is precious. Just let us know your preference, and we'll do our very best to keep them together.
faq.tq4_q: How do teachers adapt to different children?
faq.tq4_a: Every child learns differently, and our teachers are trained to see that. They use a mix of visual, hands-on, and conversational approaches — meeting each child where they are and helping them shine in their own way.

courseData.arabic_grammar_desc: Stories, exercises, and gentle guidance help your child master grammar and express themselves beautifully in Arabic.
courseData.gamedev_desc: Your child's game ideas become real! They design characters, build levels, and create a game they can proudly share with friends.
